PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q18464203 schema:description ?desc
  FILTER(REGEX(?desc , '2017'))
  .
  BIND(2017 AS ?year)
}
